nodes.x: AND now, my beloved brethren, behold, I declare unto you that except ye shall repent your houses shall be left unto you desolate.
! and your cities shall be left unto you desolate, and your beautiful habitations shall be deserted, and death and mourning shall be heard throughout the land.
115 For if they do reject these things the hour of their judgment is nigh, and their house shall be left unto them desolate.

“Another vital source of renewal is expending some of our energy by striving with the less active. Serving in this way keeps the giver from becoming weary or from fainting in his mind, making possible ‘striving with unwearied diligence that they may bring the remainder of their brethren to the knowledge of the truth; therefore there are many who do add to their numbers daily’ (Helaman 15:6).…

The word of God is direct and powerful. It is tough on the wicked and hard-hearted (1 Nephi 16:2; 2 Nephi 1:26; 9:40; 33:5) and at the same time soothing and healing to the wounded soul (Jacob 2:8).
